full_text:
Jiang Mo
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiang Mowas born in Hanyang. Sent by Jiang Xu to Ji city to co-ordinate the revolt against Ma Chao. Jiang Mo was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
